heading: Application to certain States
label: 323 Application to certain States
text: Sections 321 to 323, 325, and 327 to 329 of this title shall only apply to and take effect in the States of California, Colorado, Oregon, Nevada, Washington, Idaho, Montana, Utah, Wyoming, Arizona, New Mexico, and North and South Dakota.
notes: CodificationSection is from the first clause of section 3 of act , and the first clause of section 8 of act , as added by act .Mar. 3, 1877Mar. 3, 1877Mar. 3, 1891The second clauses of section 3 and 8 of act , are incorporated in the second paragraph of section 322 and , respectively.Mar. 3, 1877section 325 of this titleThe first clause of section 3 of act , provided that “this act shall only apply to and take effect in the States of California, Oregon and Nevada, and the Territories of Washington, Idaho, Montana, Utah, Wyoming, Arizona, New Mexico and Dakota”.Mar. 3, 1877The first clause of section 8 of act , as added by act , provided for the inclusion of Colorado.Mar. 3, 1877Mar. 3, 1891The Territories of Washington, Idaho, Montana, Utah, Wyoming, Arizona, New Mexico and Dakota have become States since the enactment of act , the Territory of Dakota being divided, to form the States of North and South Dakota.Mar. 3, 1877
